about.label: Introduction
about.p1: WAGS is a leading provider of ERP implementation and customized Odoo modules, delivering cutting-edge solutions designed to streamline business operations and boost efficiency across Saudi Arabia.
about.p2: We believe every organization has unique needs. Our seasoned team brings deep industry knowledge — enabling smart, flexible solutions that support growth and drive successful digital transformation.
about.vision.label: Vision
about.vision.title: Premier ERP Provider in the Region
about.vision.desc: To be recognized for our commitment to innovation, client success, and technical excellence — leading digital transformation across KSA and beyond.
about.mission.label: Mission
about.mission.title: Partnerships That Drive Growth
about.mission.desc: Through deep collaboration and local expertise, we ensure every implementation delivers measurable results.
about.value.label: Value
about.value.title: Innovation
about.value.desc: Continuously advancing to meet evolving business needs and industry standards.
why.label: Why Choose Us
why.sub: We don't just provide an ERP system — we build long-term partnerships that help your business grow in an ever-changing environment.
why.f1.title: Tailored Odoo Solutions
why.f1.desc: Every ERP is fully customized to your industry, workflow, and business size — no one-size-fits-all systems.
why.f2.title: ZATCA Compliant
why.f2.desc: Full compliance with Saudi regulations including VAT, e-invoicing, and all ZATCA Phase 2 standards.
why.f3.title: Long-term Partnership
why.f3.desc: Training, ongoing support, and continuous system improvement post go-live.
why.f4.title: Local Expertise
why.f4.desc: Deep knowledge of the Saudi market, VAT regulations, and business culture.
why.f5.title: Dedicated Team
why.f5.desc: Specialized ERP consultants, developers, and engineers on your project.
why.f6.title: Fast Deployment
why.f6.desc: Structured implementation plans ensure on-time go-live with minimal business disruption.
process.label: How We Work
process.sub: Our proven 4-step methodology has delivered 50+ successful Odoo implementations across the Kingdom.
process.s1.title: Discovery
process.s1.desc: We map your workflows, pain points, and growth goals through deep stakeholder interviews.
process.s2.title: Design
process.s2.desc: Architecture, module selection, and customization blueprint tailored to your business.
process.s3.title: Deploy
process.s3.desc: Agile rollout with data migration, integrations, ZATCA setup, and team training.
process.s4.title: Support
process.s4.desc: Continuous improvement, 24/7 support, and quarterly performance reviews.
services.label: Our Services
services.sub: From accounting to POS, HR to e-commerce — we build and customize the full Odoo ecosystem.
int.label: Integrations
int.sub: WAGS connects your Odoo ERP to payments, delivery, e-commerce, and government compliance — built for the Kingdom.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Welcome to WAGS Tech! At WAGS Tech, we are committed to protecting the privacy and security of our users' personal information. This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our software solutions and visit our website. Please note that WAGS Tech does not access, store, or use any personal or client-specific data that you process through our software. Your data is entirely under your control.
privacy.section1.title: Information We Collect
privacy.section1.desc: When you interact with WAGS Tech, we may collect limited information in the following ways:
privacy.section1.li1.text: We may collect information that you voluntarily provide to us when you contact us for support or inquiries. This may include your name, email address, and phone number. However, we do not collect, access, or store any client-specific data processed by our software solutions.
privacy.section1.li2.text: We may collect certain technical information about your device and usage patterns when you visit our website. This includes data such as your IP address, browser type, and operating system. However, this information is limited to website visits and does not include any client or user data processed by our software solutions.
privacy.section2.title: How We Use Your Information
privacy.section2.desc: We do not use, access, or process any client-specific data through our software. The information we collect is strictly limited to the following purposes:
privacy.section2.li1: To respond to inquiries and provide support regarding our software and services.
privacy.section2.li2: To communicate with you about updates, maintenance, or relevant service information.
privacy.section2.li3: To gather usage statistics of our website solely to improve user experience.
privacy.section2.footer: WAGS Tech does not use any personal or client data processed through the software solutions for any other purposes.
privacy.section3.title: Information Sharing and Disclosure
privacy.section3.desc: WAGS Tech does not share, disclose, or sell any data processed through our software solutions, as we do not access or store this information. The limited information we collect (e.g., inquiries or support requests) is also not shared with any third parties, except in the following situations:
privacy.section3.li1: To comply with legal obligations or enforce our legal rights.
privacy.section3.li2: If necessary, to respond to legal processes or regulatory requests.
privacy.section4.title: Data Security
privacy.section4.desc: Although WAGS Tech does not access or store client-specific data, we take the security of our systems and communications seriously. Any interactions or data you provide to us directly (e.g., support requests) are protected through reasonable security measures. However, please note that no method of transmission over the internet is entirely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.section5.title: Changes to This Privacy Policy
privacy.section5.desc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be reflected on this page, and we encourage you to review the policy periodically to stay informed about how we protect your information. Updates will only apply to future interactions and will not affect data that has already been handled.
privacy.section6.title: Contact Us
privacy.section6.desc: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at
